# two source files modified since sync -> two stale hints, exit 0
exec git init
exec git config user.email t@example.com
exec git config user.name t
exec git config commit.gpgsign false

env GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-06-05T00:00:00
env GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-06-05T00:00:00
exec git add pkg/SPEC.md pkg/a.go pkg/b.go
exec git commit -m init

cp a.go.changed pkg/a.go
cp b.go.changed pkg/b.go
exec git add -A
env GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-07-01T00:00:00
env GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-07-01T00:00:00
exec git commit -m edit

psy check
stdout '~ a.go'
stdout '~ b.go'
stdout 'summary: 0 drift, 2 stale'

-- pkg/a.go --
package pkg
-- a.go.changed --
package pkg
// a changed
-- pkg/b.go --
package pkg
-- b.go.changed --
package pkg
// b changed
-- pkg/SPEC.md --
---
package: pkg
---

# 文件

- `a.go` — a
- `b.go` — b
